query:
SELECT 
  pc.id,
  c.name as cityName,
  p.name as partnerName,
  pc.currentProfitStage,
  pc.isInvestmentRecovered,
  pc.profitRatioStage1Partner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2APartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage3Partner,
  CASE 
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 1 THEN pc.profitRatioStage1Partner
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 2 AND pc.isInvestmentRecovered = 0 THEN pc.profitRatioStage2APartner
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 2 AND pc.isInvestmentRecovered = 1 THEN pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 3 THEN pc.profitRatioStage3Partner
    ELSE 0
  END as currentPartnerRatio
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name = '无锡'
LIMIT 5;

  pc.id,
  c.name as cityName,
  p.name as partnerName,
  pc.currentProfitStage,
  pc.isInvestmentRecovered,
  pc.profitRatioStage1Partner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2APartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner,
  pc.profitRatioStage3Partner,
  CASE 
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 1 THEN pc.profitRatioStage1Partner
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 2 AND pc.isInvestmentRecovered = 0 THEN pc.profitRatioStage2APartner
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 2 AND pc.isInvestmentRecovered = 1 THEN pc.profitRatioStage2BPartner
    WHEN pc.currentProfitStage = 3 THEN pc.profitRatioStage3Partner
    ELSE 0
  END as currentPartnerRatio
FROM partner_cities pc
LEFT JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
LEFT JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name = '无锡'
LIMIT 5;
